name: Scaramouche (Tentacles)
description:
Scaramouche gets fucked and used by a tentacle monster. Feel free to insert yourself, a character or OC into it as well if you’d like to join him 🤷‍♂️ (trans Scaramouche, FTM)

The image I used got slimed by censorship so I had to cook up a quick one to use, hopefully it’s alright guys. I kinda just scribbled it down lmao
